question: Run anomaly detection on transformer T-019 winding temperature for the past 7 days and summarize any persistent abnormal periods.
effective_question: Run anomaly detection on transformer T-019 winding temperature for the past 7 days and summarize any persistent abnormal periods.
answer: Anomaly detection on transformer T-019 winding temperature for the past 7 days identified 10 anomalies, with an anomaly rate of 1.39%. However, the results also indicate a stable period from January 22 to January 29 with a mean temperature of 103.30°C and a slight positive slope of 0.94°C per day. Persistent abnormal periods were not clearly identified within the specified 7-day timeframe, but the stable period detected started after the initial 7-day window.
